name: American University of Science and Technology

admissions_process.summary: Graduate applicants apply through the official online graduate application, submit the required supporting documents, and are reviewed under the Graduate Committee and graduate admission requirements.
steps: Use the official online graduate application.
Submit the required supporting documents listed by AUST.
Meet the graduate admission requirements, including bachelor's-or-equivalent standing and English proficiency expectations.
Complete any further review or committee action required by AUST.

required_documents.summary: AUST lists graduate application documents including identity and civil-status copies, photos, academic records, certificates, the application fee, and recommendations.
items: Lebanese family civil-status record where applicable

language_requirements.summary: AUST publishes two different English-threshold values in the reviewed official sources. The graduate application instructions mention TOEFL 575 or equivalent, while the graduate admission requirements page mentions TOEFL 600 or equivalent.
notes: Do not resolve the discrepancy in this inventory pass.
Use the current graduate admissions/program pages as the canonical source for inventory, but keep the threshold gap open for later shared-data handling.

tuition_model.summary: AUST publishes a graduate tuition page with MBA/MS clear tuition at USD 320 per credit hour. This shared mapping applies that current rate across the finalized master's inventory.
notes: The Blended MBA brochure lists 36 credits, but the current admissions/program page lists 39 credits.
The brochure discrepancy is preserved in program notes and not resolved here.

tuition_table.notes: All 17 master's records map to the current official graduate tuition page at USD 320 per credit hour.

application_fee.notes: The graduate tuition page references an application fee, but the accessible source set did not expose a stable amount.

registration_fee.notes: Referenced on the graduate tuition page, but no stable amount was recovered in this pass.

accident_insurance_fee.notes: Referenced on the graduate tuition page, but no stable amount was recovered in this pass.

technology_fee.notes: Referenced on the graduate tuition page, but no stable amount was recovered in this pass.

social_security_fee.notes: Referenced on the graduate tuition page, but no stable amount was recovered in this pass.

lab_fee.notes: Referenced on the graduate tuition page, but no stable amount was recovered in this pass.

payment_methods.summary: AUST states that students pay 25% of tuition fees plus other fees at the beginning of each semester.
items: Semester-start payment of 25% of tuition plus other fees

payment_plans.summary: AUST allows deferred or installment payment by signed contract, with installments payable at the bank.
items: Installment payment payable at the bank

scholarships.summary: The official financial-aid page confirms partial scholarships for candidates with financial need who meet the relevant academic conditions.

financial_aid.summary: AUST financial aid is need-based and tied to academic standing and credit-load conditions.

academic_calendar.summary: Official academic calendar pages were found for Summer I 2025-2026, Summer II 2025-2026, and Fall 2026-2027.

graduate_regulations.summary: AUST master's regulations require 30 to 39 credits depending on the program, a minimum cumulative GPA of 3.00/4.00, and no more than two C grades. The rules PDF also notes a minimum 6-credit load for full-time graduate status.
items: 30 to 39 graduate credits depending on the program
No more than two C grades
Minimum 6 credit hours for full-time graduate status

notes: No explicit accreditation statement was recovered from the reviewed official AUST sources in this pass.

international_students.summary: International students must satisfy AUST admission requirements and Lebanese Immigration Law requirements.
items: Meet all AUST graduate admission requirements
Comply with Lebanese Immigration Law requirements
